name: Network Provider DLL - Malicious Credential Capture Registration
description: Detects registration of malicious Network Provider DLLs that capture plaintext credentials via NPLogonNotify. Monitors for NetworkProvider\Order registry modifications and new provider DLL registrations.
query: registry where event.type == "change" and (registry.path : "*NetworkProvider\\Order*" or (registry.path : "*Services\\*\\NetworkProvider*" and registry.path : "*ProviderPath*"))
